title: Implement deterministic cart merge planning
verify: Compatible actor-owned targets are ordered by updated_at DESC and id ASC.
Region, currency, sales-channel, completion, and ownership incompatibilities are rejected before mutation.
Source and target lines aggregate by Medusa Product Variant ID into a sorted immutable absolute-quantity plan.
No cart, journal status, or ownership mutation occurs in the planning slice.

verify.closure_decision: Manual closure explicitly requested by the user.
verify.summary: Manual T2 functional verification passed. The required packet was ready and hash-matched before the verdict write; strict doctor passed; the real Medusa Cart Module/PostgreSQL integration proved actor-scoped deterministic target selection, compatibility and ownership guards, Product Variant ID aggregation, immutable absolute quantities, and unchanged cart state; backend typecheck and Memory Bank lint passed. GENERAL closed the task after explicit user instruction.

evidence_required: Deterministic target-selection and merge-plan integration output.
Backend typecheck and Memory Bank lint output.
constraints: Use Medusa Query/Cart Module data and authenticated actor-derived customer scope.
Plan by Product Variant ID and absolute quantities.
Keep this slice free of cart mutations and HTTP concerns.
invariants: Client input cannot choose destination or customer.
The plan is deterministic and immutable once journaled.
purpose: Separate deterministic merge decisions from security-sensitive mutation orchestration.
success_outcome: Given source and actor context, backend logic selects one compatible target or transfer mode and produces an exact immutable plan without mutation.
anti_goals: Do not expose an HTTP route.
Do not mutate either cart or complete a journal.

forbidden_scope: storefront, checkout, order, inventory reservation, or payment behavior
stop_conditions: Medusa query data cannot prove ownership or compatibility.
Plan identity would require SKU display text.
A required public contract contradicts the linked specs.
